subject: docs(auth): flag bypass limitations and restoration steps
body:
Strengthen the auth-bypass shim with an on-load console warning, spell
out the known side effects (backend JWT 401s, useProjectRole mismatch,
no-op Sign out), and record a pending task so the flag is reverted
before release.

Tags: auth, docs, dev
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dev-auth-bypass
Semver: patch
